title: Therapy moments — pre-Jordan/Egypt header
html:
Therapy moments — pre-Jordan/Egypt header

Source: 2023-09-05 Apple Note. Header-only note — only line is "-leading up to going to Jordan and Egypt" with a trailing dash. Captured the day before the Egypt/Jordan itinerary note, suggesting it was meant to seed a longer reflection that never happened.

TL;DR

  • Body is the header itself — "leading up to going to Jordan and Egypt." Trailing - confirms he intended to add bullets.
  • Title "Therapy moments" hints at planned reflection on emotional-prep work before the YES Kennedy Lugar-adjacent Jordan trip.
  • Pairs with the next day's itinerary — together they form a two-note pre-trip diptych (one logistic, one emotional), but only the logistic side got filled in.
  • The unwritten body is the data: the emotional-prep work Yahir intended to articulate stayed unarticulated before departure.
  • Sits inside the chapter transition mode — Jordan/Egypt was the first major international solo journey, the precursor archetype for the later China chapter.

Pattern

Header-only notes are a recurring micro-form: the intent to reflect captured, the reflection itself deferred. Same shape as 2024 01 28 am i wasting too much time ebullshitring.

Open questions

  • What therapy moments was he anticipating? Solitude, family-distance, religious-site triggers?
  • Did the actual trip produce the moments? (Worth checking the Sep 10 in Jordan note for evidence.)
